Protein names: Methanol--corrinoid protein co-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.90) (Methanol:corrinoid methyltransferase 1 subunit of 50 kDa) (MT1 subunit 50 kDa)
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the MtaB family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=Co(I)-[methanol-specific corrinoid protein] + methanol + H(+) = methyl-Co(III)-[methanol-specific corrinoid protein] + H2O; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:45204, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:17570, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:17571, ChEBI:CHEBI:15377, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:16379, ChEBI:CHEBI:17790, ChEBI:CHEBI:60494; EC=2.1.1.90; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:9057830, ECO:0000269|PubMed:9363780};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Methyltransferase involved in methanogenesis in the methanol pathway. Catalyzes the methylation of the MtaC-bound cob(I)amide. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:9057830, ECO:0000269|PubMed:9363780}.
